hero.title:
Fandom stories,
in every language.
hero.subtitle: From concept to serialization and multilingual localization, our team knows K-culture fandom inside-out — and delivers end-to-end.

items.title: Genre versatility
items.desc: Romance, fantasy, action, BL, slice-of-life — we propose the right format for every IP.

items.title: One-stop production
items.desc: Planning, story, art, coloring, editing, localization, and distribution — all under one roof.

items.title: Per-process contracts
items.desc: Don't need full production? You can contract a single process — script, color, or translation alone.

services.title: What we offer
services.subtitle: Centered on webtoon production and global localization, we take fandom IP from concept to live serialization with speed and reliability.

items.title: Webtoon Production
items.desc: Full production turning fandom IP, artist universes, and original stories into complete webtoons.

items.title: Webtoon Localization
items.desc: 14 languages — native translation, typesetting, QA, platform formatting — all in one pipeline.

items.title: IP Planning / Editing
items.desc: We decode the artist universe and fandom core, then design a serialized story line.

items.title: Studio Operations
items.desc: From studio setup to artist matching and quality control.

cta.title: One IP. A global fandom.
cta.subtitle: Let's design your global launch with the Content Sales Team.
